rows.title: 20V MAX* 7-1/4 in. Sliding Miter Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Enhance productivity on the jobsite with the 20V MAX* 7-1/4 in. Sliding Miter Saw designed to make accurate cuts. With a powerful motor that delivers 183 cuts of 2x4 pine or 275 cuts of 3-1/4 pine baseboard on average, this saw is compact and lightweight for ease of use. As a part of the 20V MAX* system, this tools is compatible with all 20V MAX* batteries and chargers. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Integrated cut line cross-cut positioning system provides adjustment-free cut line indication for better accuracy and visibility
Capacity to cup 3 5/8 in. nested crown and 3 1/2 in. base vertically
Adjustable stainless steel miter detent plate with 11 positive stops improves productivity and ensures cutting accuracy
additional_features: Oversized bevel scale makes bevel angle adjustments accurate and easy
Compact, lightweight design (30 lbs.) allows for easy transport and storage
Cam lock miter handle delivers quick and accurate miter angles
Precise miter system and machined base fence support optimize durability and cutting accuracy
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 10 in. Double Bevel Fixed Miter Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Precisely execute miter and bevel cuts with the 20V MAX* XR 10 in. Double Bevel Fixed Miter Saw, our most powerful 20V MAX* compact miter saw†. Featuring regenerative braking technology, this miter saw offers exceptional runtime and efficiency. The bevel gear transmission helps maximize runtime by minimizing the power lost in the system. As a next-generation XR tool, this saw makes up to 434 cuts in 3-1/4 in. MDF base molding** and up to 311 cuts in 2 in. x 4 in. SPF**. Designed to help maximize productivity, this product captures up to 97% of dust†† to help maintain a clean work environment (battery and charger sold separately).
features: Our Most Powerful 20V MAX* Compact Miter Saw† - Make up to 434 cuts in 3-1/4 in. MDF base molding** and up to 311 cuts in 2 in. x 4 in. SPF**.
Cut. Capture. Charge. - Take advantage of exceptional runtime and efficiency with the bevel gear transmission that helps maximize runtime by minimizing the power lost in the system.
Cordless Compatibility - Our first 10 in. Miter Saw compatible with the full range of DEWALT 20V MAX* and DEWALT FLEXVOLT batteries (sold separately)‡.
additional_features: Efficient Dust Collection - Capture up to 97% of dust†† during use.
Large Cut Capacity - Cut up to 6 in. horizontally, 5-1/4 in. baseboard vertically or 5-1/4 in. crown nested.
Proven Accuracy - Get adjustment-free cut line indication with the CUTLINE blade positioning system.
Easy Portability - Move around the jobsite with ease utilizing the convenient carry handle and a lightweight design of only 34 lbs. (tool only).
Quick Bevel Adjustments - Set bevel cuts to 22.5º or 33.9º fast with the included bevel pawls.
Intuitive Design - Easily adjust miter and bevel cut settings with simple touchpoints.

TOOL CONNECT TAG READY - Featuring TOOL CONNECT TAG READY functionality (DEWALT tag sold separately) when paired with the DEWALT Site Manager app that shows data on asset management and tool location***.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
Tool Only - Battery and charger sold separately
includes: (1) DCS714 DEWALT 20V MAX* XR 10 in. Double Bevel Fixed Miter Saw
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20. Nominal voltage is 18.
†Based on MWO using DCB2108 battery (sold separately)
‡DEWALT batteries in market as of 12/31/24. For best performance, use 8Ah (or higher) battery (sold separately).
††Cutting 2in x 4in. SPF, using DCB2108 battery, DWV014 vacuum and DXVCS002 separator (battery, vacuum and separator sold separately).
***Additional subscription charge and third party data rate charges may apply.

rows.title: 60V MAX* Brushless Cordless 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Get the power of corded with the freedom of cordless with the 60V MAX* system. The 60V MAX* 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw Regenerative Braking Technology extends runtime with virtually every cut. This miter saw features an efficient bevel gear transmission and has the ability to capture up to 94% of dust***. With the CUTLINE blade positioning system for accurate cuts, this saw also features updated controls designed for premium ergonomics. At a weight of 50.9 lbs. (tool only), this saw goes from jobsite to jobsite with ease. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Single Battery Operation - Capable power from 60V MAX* to tackle professional applications. Battery sold separately.
Exceptional Runtime - Delivers up to 675 cuts in 3 1/4 in. MDF Base Molding & 255 cuts in pressure treated 4 in. x 4 in. Lumber**
CUT.CAPTURE.CHARGE Regenerative Braking Technology - Extends runtime by redirecting lost energy back into the battery (sold separately).
additional_features: Efficient Dust Capture - Up to 94% of dust captured when cutting 2x10 SPF using DWV015 Dust Extractor (sold separately).***

Dual-Fitting Dust Port - Standard AirLock port for seamless integration with DEWALT extractors, also compatible with standard 1-7/8 in. & 2-1/2 in. wet/dry vacuums with included adapter. (Extractors and wet/dry vacuums sold separately.)
Optimized Capacity - Cuts 6-1/2 in. Baseboard Vertically, 6-1/2 in. Crown Molding Nested & 12-3/16 in. wide lumber.
Proven Accuracy - CUTLINE blade positioning system provides adjustment-free cut line indication.
Convenient Portability - Optimized design weighs only 50.9 lb (bare tool) for easy transport.
Bevel-Gear Transmission - Delivers fast, reliable cutting and is designed to reduce the power losses that may occur with belt-drive designs.
Ease Of Use - Easy blade change and cut depth, miter and bevel cut adjustment.
includes: (1) DCS781 60V Max* Brushless Cordless 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 60 volts. Nominal voltage is 54.
**Using a DeWalt FLEXVOLT DCB609 battery (sold separately).
***When Cutting 2x10 SPF using DCB609 battery and DWV015 Dust Extractor (both sold separately).

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Precisely execute miter and bevel cuts with the 20V MAX* XR 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw, our first 12 in. 20V MAX* Miter Saw compatible with our entire range of 20V MAX* and DEWALT FLEXVOLT batteries‡ (sold separately). Featuring regenerative braking technology, this miter saw offers exceptional runtime and efficiency. The bevel gear transmission helps maximize runtime by minimizing the power lost in the system. As our largest cut capacity 20V MAX* miter saw, this saw delivers up to 371 cuts in 3 1/4 in. MDF Base Molding** and up to 153 cuts in pressure treated 4 in. X 4 in. timber**. With integrated WIRELESS TOOL CONTROL designed to maximize productivity, this product captures up to 97% of dust†† to help maintain a clean work environment (battery and charger sold separately).
features: Our Largest Cut Capacity 20V MAX* Miter Saw - Cut up to 14 in. horizontally, 6-1/2 in. baseboard standing up, or 6-1/2 in. crown nested.

Cut. Capture. Charge. - Help maximize productivity and battery life. Regenerative braking technology helps deliver up to 371 cuts in 3 1/4 in. MDF Base Molding** and up to 153 cuts in pressure treated 4 in. X 4 in. timber**.
Cordless Compatibility - Our first 12 in. Miter Saw compatible with the full range of DEWALT 20V MAX* and DEWALT FLEXVOLT batteries (sold separately)‡.
additional_features: Efficient Dust Collection - Capture up to 97% of dust†† during use.

Help Minimize Clean-Up - Help maintain a clean work environment with integrated WIRELESS TOOL CONTROL that enables vacuum operation with the pull of a trigger (dust bag and vacuum adaptor included, vacuum sold separately).
Proven Accuracy - Get adjustment-free cut line indication with the CUTLINE blade positioning system.
Bevel Gear Transmission - Work confidently with a transmission designed to help minimize power loss.
Easy Portability - Move around the jobsite with ease utilizing the convenient carry handles and a lightweight design of only 51.7 lbs. (tool only).
Quick Bevel Adjustments - Set bevel cuts to 22.5º or 33.9º fast with the included bevel pawls.
Intuitive Design - Set the depth of cut and adjust miter and bevel cut settings with simple touchpoints.

TOOL CONNECT TAG READY - Featuring TOOL CONNECT TAG READY functionality (DEWALT tag sold separately) when paired with the DEWALT Site Manager app that shows data on asset management and tool location†.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
includes: (1) DCS785 DEWALT 20V MAX* XR 12 in. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw (Tool Only)
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20. Nominal voltage is 18.
†Additional subscription charge and third party data rate charges may apply.
††Cutting 2x10 SPF using DCB2108 battery (sold separately) DWV015 Vacuum (sold separately), and DWV9402 Fleece Bag (sold separately)
‡DEWALT batteries in the market as of 12/31/24, and for best performance use 8Ah (or higher) battery (sold separately).

rows.title: 120V MAX* 12 in. (305mm) Double Bevel Compound Miter Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Powered by FLEXVOLT 20V/60V MAX* batteries this 12 in. (305 mm.) 120V MAX* Compound Miter Saw delivers the power and cutting capacity that professionals demand on the jobsite. Featuring the CUTLINE Blade Positioning System for adjustment-free cutline indicator, this saw comes with a 120V AC adapter for corded or cordless operation. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Flexible Power - Corded or cordless power
Runtime - Up to 289 cross-cuts in 3-1/2 in. baseboard
CUTLINE Blade Positioning System - Delivers adjustment free cutline indicator
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20, 60, and 120 volts. Nominal voltage is 18, 54, and 108. 120V MAX* is based on using two FLEXVOLT 20V/60V MAX* Lithium ion batteries combined.

With both corded and cordless options, this saw provides the power you need on tough jobsites. Featuring an adjustable miter scale with 11 positive stops and a high-visibility bevel scale for accuracy, this saw is ready to tackle your toughest applications. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Flexible Power - Corded or cordless power
Runtime - Up to 289 cross cuts in 3-1/4 in. Baseboard
CUTLINE Blade Positioning System - Delivers accurate line of sight to the cut
includes: (1) DHS 790 12 in (305mm) 120V MAX* Double Bevel Sliding Compound Miter Saw
applications: Cutting molding (crown, base, and chair rail)
Cutting casing for doors and windows
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20, 60, and 120 volts. Nominal voltage is 18, 54, and 108. 120V MAX* is based on using two FLEXVOLT 20V/60V MAX* Lithium ion batteries combined.

rows.title: 12 in. (305mm) Double-Bevel Compound Miter Saw
rows.description: Get the job done with the 12 in. Double-Bevel Compound Miter Saw featuring a 15 Amp motor and a stainless-steel miter detent plate. Get accurate, repeatable cuts with accuracy and durability with this lightweight saw designed for professional jobsites.
features: 15 amp, 3,800 rpm motor delivers extended power and durability
Cam lock miter handle with detent override deliver quick and accurate miter angles
Adjustable stainless steel miter detent plate with 11 positive stops Improves productivity and ensures cutting accuracy
additional_features: Precise miter system and machined-base fence support optimize cutting accuracy
Tall sliding fences support crown molding up to 6-5/8" nested and base molding up to 6-1/2" vertically against the fence while easily sliding out of the way for bevel cuts
Innovative gearbox and belt-drive design increases vertical cutting capacity

Double bevel design allows saw to bevel left and right 0 degrees - 48 degrees with positive stops at 0 degrees , 33.9 degrees , 45 degrees , and 48 degrees both left and right allowing user to flip the saw not the material
Exclusive back-fence design cuts dimensional lumber 2" x 10" at 90 degrees and 2" x 8" at 45 degrees
0-50 degrees left and right miter capacity for greater versatility
Lightweight (44 lbs.), head lock-down pin, and built-in carrying handle for increased portability
